content: Self-Refine's iterative single-model self-feedback framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to resolve the common blind spot that single-perspective self-feedback fails to catch logical or structural flaws the model inherently overlooks. This creates a hybrid self-improvement system that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or labeled data while boosting refinement quality beyond what either approach can achieve alone.
